name: Lacuna Claude Usage
author: Lacuna
description: Lacuna-styled top-bar widget for Claude Code usage.

barWidget.description: Shows Claude Code 5-hour block usage left from local Claude project logs.

schema.label: Refresh interval (ms)
schema.description: How often to read local Claude usage state.

schema.label: Show usage meter
schema.description: Draw a small used-percent meter under the widget.

schema.label: Show when idle
schema.description: Keep the widget visible as 100% left when no active 5-hour block exists.

schema.label: Cycle weekly usage
schema.description: Rotate the bar label between the 5-hour block and the trailing 7-day window.

schema.label: Cycle interval (ms)
schema.description: How long each readout (5h / weekly) stays before rolling to the other.

schema.label: Display mode
schema.description: Use full text, or a compact percent-only label.

schema.label: Color profile
schema.description: Override the global Lacuna color profile for this widget.
